title: Sign in .. Sick
content:
This illness is taking longer than I expected. %(me)May be I didn't knock on the wood hard enough.% Beside the cold, I now have some sort of ear infection too. With only one good ear at the moment, I think it's a good idea to selectively hear only good thing. :)

Nothing much to update since I've been spending a very good part of each day in bed during the past week. Can't promise when I'll be back but, rest a sure, I'm not going anywhere. ;)
